name: loanDepot, Inc.
business: loanDepot, Inc. is a provider of lending solutions for homeownership, offering a broad suite of mortgage loan products including conventional, FHA/VA, jumbo loans, and home equity lines, as well as servicing and ancillary real estate services. It originates loans through consumer direct, in-market loan officers, and joint venture channels.

exposures.sentence: Our proprietary technology platform, mello, plays a role in improving the mortgage process by applying intelligent underwriting parameters for automated loan determination.

We are a leading provider of lending solutions that make the American dream of homeownership more accessible and achievable for all, especially the increasingly diverse communities of first-time homebuyers
mello Home Services, LLC and mello Insurance Services, LLC are our wholly-owned captive real estate referral and insurance businesses.
We are subject to cyberattacks, information or security breaches and technology disruptions or failures.
Our use of artificial intelligence in our business, and challenges with properly managing its use could result in harm.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. annual one-to-four family residential mortgage origination volume expected to rise from $2.05 trillion in 2025 to $2.22 trillion in 2026.
tamClaims.sentence: In February 2026, the MBA forecast an 8% increase in U.S. annual one-to-four family residential mortgage origination volume from $2.05 trillion in 2025 to $2.22 trillion in 2026, with a 10% increase in refinance activity.
